# Code for: Climate change and wildfire shape genome-wide diversity


```{bash}

# Download and process data -----------------------------------------

bash data_processing/JOB_DATA_PROCESSING.sh

# Run analyses ------------------------------------------------------
 
## Population structure using ADMIXTURE/PCA
bash analysis/admixture/JOB_ADMIXTURE.sh

## Isolation by distance and environment using GDM
bash analysis/ibdibe/JOB_IBDIBE.sh

## Demographic reconstruction using SMC++
bash analysis/smcpp/JOB_SMCPP.sh

## Genotype-environment association analysis using RDA
bash analysis/gea/JOB_GEA.sh

## Genetic diversity modelling
bash analysis/genetic_diversity/JOB_GENETIC_DIVERSITY.sh

```
